heading: Director of Small Business Programs
label: 8028 Director of Small Business Programs
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 5028 of this title

Change of NameThe Director of Small and Disadvantaged Business Utilization of the Department of the Navy and the Office of Small and Disadvantaged Business Utilization of the Department of the Navy were redesignated the Director of Small Business Programs of the Department of the Navy and the Office of Small Business Programs of the Department of the Navy, respectively, by which also provided that references to the former were deemed to refer to the latter. See , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 109–163section 904(a) of Pub. L. 109–163section 144 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

children.heading: .—Director
children.label: a .—Director
children.text: There is a Director of Small Business Programs in the Department of the Navy. The Director is appointed by the Secretary of the Navy.

children.heading: .—Office of Small Business Programs
children.label: b .—Office of Small Business Programs
children.text: The Office of Small Business Programs of the Department of the Navy is the office that is established within the Department of the Navy under section 15(k) of the Small Business Act (). The Director of Small Business Programs is the head of such office.15 U.S.C. 644(k)

The Director of Small Business Programs shall, subject to paragraph (2), perform such duties regarding small business programs of the Department of the Navy, and shall exercise such powers regarding those programs, as the Secretary of the Navy may prescribe.
Section 15(k) of the Small Business Act (), except for the designations of the Director and the Office, applies to the Director of Small Business Programs.15 U.S.C. 644(k)
